valid.description: True when the action would be accepted for agent.action.run at validation time (subject to races).

definition_snapshot_hash.description: Redacted snapshot hash of the action definition at validation time, when available.

would_replay_existing_execution.description: True when the same action_id and idempotency_key would return an existing execution on run without enqueueing a new one.

existing_execution_id.description: Present when would_replay_existing_execution is true and a persisted execution was found.
